patch:
--- a/comparator.sv
+++ b/comparator.sv
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@ module comp_16bit (
   input [15:0] bus_a, bus_b,
-  input equal_flag,
+  output equal_flag,
   output [1:0] result
 );
   assign equal_flag = (bus_a == bus_b);
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@ module comp_16bit (
 module top_level (
   input [15:0] sig1, sig2,
   output match
 );
   comp_16bit cmp_inst (
     .bus_a(sig1),
     .bus_b(sig2),
